testcase.classname: Robustness Suite Long-Running Stability should survive extended period without getting stuck
testcase.name: Robustness Suite Long-Running Stability should survive extended period without getting stuck

testcase.classname: Robustness Suite Failure Recovery should recover from 3 consecutive action failures

testcase.classname: Robustness Suite Autonomous Behavior should generate and complete autonomous goal

testcase.classname: Robustness Suite Memory Management should consolidate memory automatically
testcase.name: Robustness Suite Memory Management should consolidate memory automatically

testcase.classname: Robustness Suite Learning should generate reflection learnings
testcase.name: Robustness Suite Learning should generate reflection learnings

testcase.classname: Robustness Suite Integration Verification should maintain all robustness features together
